description: Style NoteThis tee from lee allows you to be rugged and casual, right from the cool colour backdrop to the print in the front. Goes well with dark denims and light blue canvas shoes.Product DetailsBlue round-neck T-shirt, has short sleeves and graphic print on the chestMaterial and Care100% cottonMachine wash coolDo not bleach or wringTumble dry low or dry in shadeLow iron do not iron on printSize and FitRegular fitThe model (Height 6' and shoulders 18& rdquo ) is wearing a size M
